title: Project Coordinator
required_skills: MS Word / Excel / PowerPoint / Outlook proficiency
Excellent oral and written communication skills
matched_skills: MS Excel and PowerPoint (listed in tools)
Document management and governance (HSBC PMO, Hapag-Lloyd)
Strong multilingual communication (English C1, German B1, Chinese/Cantonese C2)
Financial administration and expense tracking (USD 8M programme at HSBC)
Detail-oriented process execution (PMO governance, sprint documentation)
Tech-savvy (Power BI PL-300, JIRA, Confluence, Looker Studio)
Bachelor's degree (Management Administration, South China University of Technology)
missing_skills: HR / onboarding operations experience (workforce/staffing context is new)
Contract drafting or approval workflow management
Life sciences / clinical operations domain knowledge
key_requirements: Support onboarding, payroll liaison, and consultant record maintenance
Handle financial administration and expense tracking
Assist Program Manager with project monitoring, documentation, and presentations
Conduct weekly check-ins and manage timesheets for consultants
Support contract drafting, approval processes, and retention initiatives
cv_highlights: HSBC PMO: owned financial tracking across a USD 8M digital transformation programme with C-suite escalation
Hapag-Lloyd: cross-functional agile coordination, sprint documentation, and executive reporting
ECE Group: project progress reporting, spreadsheet optimisation, and vendor/stakeholder scheduling
Multilingual (English/German/Chinese/Cantonese) — strong fit for EMEA/APAC client-facing coordination
Power BI PL-300 certified and proficient in JIRA, Confluence, Excel, PowerPoint
gaps: Role is a staffing/workforce operations coordinator — below Boru's current seniority (PMO / programme governance level)
No direct experience in HR onboarding workflows or timesheet/payroll systems
Life sciences (clinical operations, biostatistics, regulatory) is entirely new domain
Contract drafting and retention management not evidenced in CV
recommended_emphasis: Lead with project coordination and documentation experience at Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC to directly mirror JD responsibilities
Highlight financial administration and expense tracking from HSBC PMO (budget dashboards, burn-rate reports)
Emphasise stakeholder communication and check-in cadence management (sprint ceremonies, weekly reviews)
Position multilingual capability as a differentiator for global workforce coordination across EMEA and APAC
Downplay PMO/programme governance seniority framing — reframe as operational coordination and support
recommendation: Apply with moderate confidence. Boru's coordination, documentation, financial tracking, and stakeholder communication skills map cleanly onto this role's requirements. However, this is a staffing operations coordinator position — operationally junior relative to Boru's PMO background — and the life sciences context is unfamiliar territory. The role may offer limited career progression and could be perceived as a step back. Suitable as a transitional or volume application, not a primary target.
